title: 信息日报 2026-07-02

headline.title: Bending Spoons 逆 SaaS 寒潮上市首日飙升 40%
headline.summary: Bending Spoons 通过收购并改造 AOL、Eventbrite、Evernote 等老牌科技品牌实现快速增长，其上市首日股价大涨 40%，显示出市场对其“收购+翻新”模式的认可，也为低迷的 SaaS 行业注入一剂强心针。
headline.title_en: Bending Spoons defies SaaS slump, surges 40% on first day of trading
headline.summary_en: Bending Spoons, which has grown rapidly by acquiring and revamping legacy tech brands like AOL, Eventbrite, Evernote, and Meetup, surged 40% on its first day of trading, signaling market confidence in its 'acquire-and-refresh' strategy and offering a bright spot in the sluggish SaaS landscape.
headline.original_title: Bending Spoons defies SaaS slump, surges 40% on first day of trading
headline.reason: 该事件融合了创业、融资、市场情绪等多重要素，且为当日最具冲击力的商业新闻，反映了科技行业逆境中的突围模式。
headline.reason_en: This event combines startup dynamics, funding, and market sentiment, representing the most impactful business story of the day and highlighting a resilient growth model in the tech downturn.
